results: form-cli now has native model-convergence and final-observations verbs that report one wide remaining model-lane move.
The form-cli four-way band increased from 65535 to 131071 and proves the wide-lane native dispatch.
The sampler/min-p lane is part of synthesis-status, model-gap receipts, local receipts, and the full composition receipt.

The full-real Llama claim gate now records one blocked requirement: tensor payload staging -> dequant/buffer placement -> hidden-state loop -> hidden-state logits -> real token ID decode -> ask binding.

The model-lane gap receipt observes full GGUF map, semantic token decode, full-width logits over 128256 vocabulary rows, sampler min-p, Metal GQA loop, ask-staged model-call, and decoded prose binding.
Full real Llama GGUF token generation remains pending and unclaimed.
